summary: Network has solid skeleton (79 nodes, 120 edges) covering most major seed-size pathways and a clean BR Perception Gate. However, three structural gaps require iteration: (1) DELLA is completely absent so GA signaling has no proper Perception Gate (GA acts directly on Integument_Growth, violating motif purity); (2) the GRF–GIF1 cell-proliferation hub is broken — GIF1 has 8 curated edges but appears in the network as a 0-input source with only 1 outgoing edge; (3) ANT (master integument TF) sits as a 0-input source with only 1 outgoing edge while curated edge E030 ANT→Integument_Growth (HIGH conf) is silently rejected. Sixteen HIGH-confidence curated edges between existing nodes are unused (E030, E040, E042, E083, E101, E102, E116, E120, E133, E136, E146, E149, E161, E170, E212, plus the AGG3 G-protein wiring). Source % is 45.6% (acceptable, just below the 50% soft cap). Verdict: iterate.

pathway_completeness.justification: Eight of twelve target pathways are present at workable depth (maternal integument, ubiquitin-proteasome, IKU/HAIKU, PRC2, auxin, BR, CK, ABA/maturation). Gibberellin has biosynthesis and direct phenotype effect but lacks the DELLA repressor that defines GA signaling — GA currently acts as if constitutively-active, which is biologically wrong (GA destabilises DELLA which represses growth). Sugar/T6P/TOR/SnRK1 is entirely absent. miR396→GRF→GIF1 cell-proliferation arm is broken (GIF1 detached). Seed-oil/maturation arc is incomplete (WRI1 missing despite 3 curated activators in network).

mechanistic_depth.justification: Most cascades are properly layered: BR→BRI1→BIN2⊣BZR1 implements the canonical Perception Gate, the LEC1/LEC2/FUS3/ABI3/4/5 maturation cascade is multi-stepped, and DA1/DA2/EOD1/UBP15 ubiquitin module is well-modelled with negative feedback. Weak spots: GA acts directly on Integument_Growth without DELLA intermediary, and ANT/TTG2/SEEDSTICK each terminate after a single edge instead of integrating with the broader maternal cascade.

motif_coverage.justification: Perception Gate correctly applied for BR (single hormone→receptor edge, all downstream via BZR1) and partially for Auxin (Auxin→TIR1, but Auxin also has direct edges to Integument_Growth and Endosperm_Proliferation — these are bypass edges that violate Perception Gate purity). NOT applied for GA (DELLA missing entirely). NOT applied for CK (no AHK/AHP receptor module — acceptable since literature gap). Biosynthesis-Degradation Balance correctly used for CK (IPT/CKX2/3/5) and ABA (NCED3/ABA2/CYP707A) and GA (GA20OX/3OX/2OX). Multi-Output Scaffold underused: AGG3 should output to AGB1 (E133) and Seed_Size (E136) directly, currently only to Cell_Proliferation_Duration.

cascade_balance.justification: Source nodes 36/79 = 45.6% — within softened 30–50% target. Most nodes have 1–5 inputs as required. Hubs reasonable: Integument_Growth (14 in), Endosperm_Proliferation (8 in), BZR1 (1 in / 6 out). Issues: ANT (0 in, 1 out), TTG2 (0 in, 1 out), GIF1 (0 in, 1 out), KLUH (0 in, 1 out), AGB1 (0 in, 1 out), GPA1 (0 in, 1 out) are all marked as sources but have curated regulators that were silently dropped. Several 0-output side branches don't reach the phenotype directly (Cell_Proliferation_Duration is a sink that connects only to Cell_Proliferation — chain to Seed_Size needs a path).

composite_node_handling.justification: PRC2 is correctly composited from MEA, FIS2, FIE, MSI1 with all four subunits as activators. CKX gene family kept split (CKX2 vs CKX3 vs CKX5) which is appropriate since they have distinct expression domains. GA20OX/GA3OX/GA2OX kept split which is correct since they catalyse different reactions. VAL1 and VAL2 kept separate (could be composited) but this is a minor judgement call. GRF should probably be a composite of GRF1/2/3/5 (currently a single node, which is fine if treated as composite name).

hub_completeness.justification: Integument_Growth has 14 inputs covering most curated regulators (KLUH, TTG2, ARF2, AP2, DA1, DA2, EOD1, UBP15, SOD7, DPA4, GIF1, Auxin, GA, AGG3) but is MISSING ANT (E030 HIGH conf), SEEDSTICK (E161 HIGH conf), Cell_Proliferation (E170 HIGH conf), and Endosperm_Proliferation→Integument_Growth (E074 HIGH conf). Endosperm_Proliferation (8 in) is missing Brassinosteroid (E101 HIGH conf direct). Seed_Size phenotype is missing direct AGG3 (E136), GIF1 (E149), ABI5 (E116) inputs.

topology_hazards.justification: No catastrophic hazards. BR Perception Gate is clean (Brassinosteroid has only 1 outgoing edge to BRI1). Auxin has 3 outgoing edges (TIR1, Integument_Growth, Endosperm_Proliferation) which is a partial Perception Gate violation — the direct Integument_Growth and Endosperm_Proliferation edges bypass the TIR1→ARF2 signaling module. Cytokinin has 3 outgoing edges (Endosperm_Proliferation, Ovule_size, DA1) with no receptor in the network — acceptable since CK receptor module not curated. DA1/DA2/EOD1 mutual feedback loops are NEGATIVE (stabilising) per CLAUDE.md. ABI4 self-loop (E212) is curated but should be reviewed for stability. No positive Hormone↔Transporter feedback loops observed.

evidence_quality.justification: Sampled 8 edges (E001 DA1→UBP15, E107 ABA→ABI5, E020 TTG2→Integument_Growth, E040 SHB1→IKU2, E149 GIF1→Seed_Size, E136 AGG3→Seed_Size, E133 AGG3→AGB1, E195 Cytokinin→DA1). All have specific mechanism strings (e.g., 'DA1 peptidase cleaves UBP15 after ubiquitylation', 'ChIP', 'CK reduces DA1 protein accumulation without affecting mRNA') and direct supporting evidence sentences. DOIs are real, mostly Plant Cell / Plant Journal / Nature Plants. No placeholder mechanisms detected. Authors are populated.

phenotype_audit.justification: Seed_Size has 5 inputs (Integument_Growth+, Endosperm_Proliferation+, Ovule_size+, Storage_reserves+, ABA-) which is in the 3–5 target range and includes both promoting and repressing arms. Major effector classes covered: maternal (Integument_Growth), filial (Endosperm_Proliferation), ovule, reserves, hormone (ABA). MISSING direct effectors that have HIGH-confidence curated edges to Seed_Size: AGG3 (E136), GIF1 (E149), ABI5 (E116). Adding these would improve coverage but slightly inflate input count to 8 — still acceptable.

rejected_edges_review.justification: 101 of 216 curated edges are unused. Many rejections are defensible (target node not in network, peripheral pathway, paralog already represented). However, 16 HIGH-confidence edges between EXISTING nodes were silently rejected without justification: E030, E040, E042, E083, E101, E102, E116, E120, E133, E136, E146, E149, E161, E170, E195 (verified IN), E212. Of these, E101 and E102 may be defensibly rejected as Perception Gate bypass edges (BR should route through BZR1) but this rationale should be documented and the alternative BZR1→Endosperm_Proliferation / BZR1⊣PRC2 edges added to preserve the biology.

key_player_density.justification: Multiple major players show severe under-representation. DELLA (5 curated edges, 0 in network = 0.00) is completely absent — GA signaling has no repressor. WRI1 (6 curated, 0 in network = 0.00) is completely absent — seed oil/storage maturation TF missing. GIF1 (8 curated, 1 in network = 0.12) is detached — GRF→GIF1→Seed_Size hub broken. ANT (6 curated, 1 in network = 0.17) treated as peripheral despite being master integument identity TF. TTG2 (5 curated, 1 in network = 0.20) and SEEDSTICK (8 curated, 3 in network = 0.38) under-connected. These are all canonical seed-size regulators and any specialist would flag this.

per_node_audit.comment: Biosynthesis–degradation balance correct; direct ABA⊣Seed_Size captures maturation effect.
Source biosynthesis enzyme — fine as is_source=True.
Excellent coverage of master maturation hub. All curated regulators present.

curated_regulators_excluded: self-loop E212 ABI4→ABI4(+) NOT in network
per_node_audit.comment: Single activator (ABI3). Curated edge E212 ABI4 self-positive feedback excluded — review for stability before adding.
Add E116 ABI5⊣Seed_Size (-) for direct ABI5 effect; currently routes only through SHB1→Endosperm_Proliferation.

curated_regulators_excluded: E133 AGG3→AGB1 (+) HIGH conf — NETWORK HAS REVERSED DIRECTION
per_node_audit.comment: Network has AGB1→AGG3 but curated E133 is AGG3→AGB1. Both subunits stabilize each other in heterotrimer; consider symmetrical or add the curated direction.
Add direct E136 AGG3→Seed_Size; currently only routes via Cell_Proliferation_Duration which is itself a sink.
Negative regulator of CK signaling (acts on AHP6 phosphorelay); modelled here as ⊣Cytokinin which collapses signaling effect into hormone level.
BR-responsive bHLH inhibitor of HAIKU pathway. Multi-output scaffold pattern correctly applied.
ANT is THE master integument identity TF. With only 1 outgoing edge it is treated as peripheral. Add E030 (ANT→Integument_Growth). Adding DELLA node would enable E028.
Maternal repressor with two regulators (BR via BZR1, age via miR172) and two phenotype outputs. Well-balanced.
Auxin-responsive maternal repressor properly integrated with both Auxin and BR signals.

Auxin has 3 outgoing edges — the Integument_Growth and Endosperm_Proliferation edges bypass the TIR1→ARF2 perception module. Consider removing direct edges and routing via ARF2; or accept bypass and add E083 to complete the auxin–PRC2 link.
BR catabolic CYP72B1 — part of Biosynthesis-Degradation balance for BR.
GSK3 kinase relay properly modelled.
Polycomb-recruiting BBR/BPC TF — source is fine.
Receptor kinase, single-input from hormone — perception gate apex.

Master BR-responsive TF — 6 outputs is high but justified (BES1/BZR1 have hundreds of targets in vivo). Consider routing E101 BR→Endosperm_Proliferation and E102 BR⊣PRC2 through here as additional outputs.
Single outgoing edge to BRI1 = clean Perception Gate. Direct E101/E102 should NOT be added (would break gate); route via BZR1 instead.
CK degradation enzyme integrated with PRC2 and IKU pathways.
CK oxidase — source acceptable since regulators not curated.
CK oxidase paralog.
ABA 8'-hydroxylase — part of ABA bio/degradation balance.
Add E170 to wire Cell_Proliferation also to Integument_Growth, completing the maternal arm.
G-protein→duration→proliferation chain functional.
Excellent biosynthesis–degradation modelling. Direct downstream effects acceptable since no AHK receptor in network.
Negative-feedback DA1↔DA2 and DA1↔EOD1 loops correctly modelled (stabilising per CLAUDE.md).
RING-type E3 ligase, well-integrated.
BR biosynthesis steroid 5α-reductase.
NGAL2/DPA4 limit cell expansion in seed coat.
C-22 hydroxylase — BR biosynthesis.
Cell-cycle TF receiving SEEDSTICK input, drives proliferation.
BIG BROTHER E3 ligase, mutual feedback with DA1.
Add BZR1→Endosperm_Proliferation (+) to capture BR’s well-documented promotion of coenocytic endosperm growth (E101 effect via signaling, not direct ligand).
PRC2 subunit (WD40).
PRC2 SET domain subunit — imprinted.

curated_regulators_excluded: E120 LEC2→FUS3 (+) HIGH conf (would create positive feedback with FUS3→LEC2)
E125 FUS3→WRI1 (+) HIGH conf (target WRI1 not in network)
per_node_audit.comment: LEC2↔FUS3 mutual activation is canonical but creates a positive feedback loop — BUILDER should evaluate damping risk if adding E120.
GA biosynthesis.
GA catabolism — biosyn/degradation balance.
GA biosynthesis terminal step.
GRF–GIF1 is THE canonical cell-proliferation co-activator complex. Adding E146 reconnects the miR396→GRF→GIF1 chain; adding E149 wires GIF1 directly to phenotype.
Gα subunit — source acceptable.
Add E146 GRF→GIF1 to restore the GRF/GIF heterodimer relationship.

curated_regulators_excluded: E033 GA⊣DELLA (-) HIGH conf (DELLA not in network — perception gate broken)
per_node_audit.comment: GA acts directly on Integument_Growth, but biology is GA destabilises DELLA which represses growth. Add DELLA node and route GA⊣DELLA⊣Integument_Growth.
VQ-domain protein in HAIKU pathway.
The textbook HAIKU pathway is SHB1→MINI3→IKU1/IKU2. Currently SHB1→IKU2 and MINI3→IKU2 are silently rejected; only IKU1→IKU2 is in. Add E040 and E042.
Isopentenyltransferase — CK biosynthesis.

Largest hub in network (14 inputs). Adding E030, E161, E170, E074 would bring it to 18 — high but acceptable for the master maternal integrator. Consider trimming low-impact direct hormone edges if balance becomes a concern.
CYP78A5 — promotes maternal cell proliferation. Source acceptable since upstream regulators not curated.

curated_regulators_excluded: E123 LEC1→WRI1 (+) HIGH conf (WRI1 not in network)
per_node_audit.comment: Master maturation TF; add LEC1→WRI1 once WRI1 added as new node.
Add LEC2→WRI1 once WRI1 in network.
MEDEA SET-domain PRC2 subunit — imprinted.
Add E042 to complete HAIKU pathway.
WD40 PRC2 subunit.
ABA biosynthesis 9-cis-epoxycarotenoid dioxygenase.
Ovule pre-fertilization size determinants well-covered.
Auxin transporter that increases local pool in seed.
PICKLE chromatin remodeler — represses LAFL after germination.
Add Auxin⊣PRC2 (E083) directly. For E102, route via BZR1⊣PRC2 to preserve BR Perception Gate.
B3-domain TF, BR-suppressed.
Retinoblastoma-related cell-cycle inhibitor.
Add E161; SEEDSTICK is a direct integument promoter, not just an E2FA upstream.
Co-repressor that promotes ovule integument identity.
Add E040 to wire SHB1→IKU2 directly (canonical HAIKU).
NGAL2/SOD7 GROWTH-REGULATING-FACTOR-INTERACTING.
Adding the three direct effectors increases input count to 8. Acceptable for the phenotype; preserves both promoting and repressing arms.
Once WRI1 is added, wire WRI1→Storage_reserves to capture seed-oil/maturation arm.
Auxin biosynthesis TAA-related, repressed by PRC2.
TCP-class proliferation promoter.
Auxin co-receptor F-box.
Lower coverage ratio (0.20) but excluded regulators are non-network nodes — literature_gap, not silent rejection.
Ubiquitin-specific protease antagonising DA1.
B3-domain LAFL repressor.
VAL1 paralog — could be composited but kept separate is fine.
Auxin biosynthesis flavin monooxygenase.
Auxin biosynthesis paralog of YUC10.
Juvenile-phase miRNA, source.
Adult-phase miRNA targeting AP2.
miR396 represses GRF (sign correctly -1 in network).

per_pathway_audit.comment: All canonical TFs present as nodes but ANT and SEEDSTICK both have only 1 outgoing edge each; their direct Integument_Growth targets (E030, E161) were silently rejected. KLUH and TTG2 wired correctly.
Beautifully modelled: DA1⊣DA2 with DA2→DA1 and DA1⊣EOD1 with EOD1→DA1 negative-feedback dual loops; UBP15 antagonist; SOD7/DPA4 separate inhibitors of Integument_Growth. Cytokinin⊣DA1 included.
All four nodes present, but the canonical SHB1→IKU2 (E040) and MINI3→IKU2 (E042) edges are silently rejected. Currently IKU2 only receives BZR1, IKU1, RAV1.
Composite PRC2 with all 4 subunits as activators; downstream targets Endosperm_Proliferation, CKX2, YUC10, TAR1 well-modelled.
Biosynthesis (YUC10/11, TAR1, PGP10) and signaling (TIR1→ARF2) present. Perception Gate partially violated by direct Auxin→Integument_Growth and Auxin→Endosperm_Proliferation bypass edges.

Clean Perception Gate (BR has only 1 outgoing edge to BRI1). Biosynthesis-degradation balanced. BZR1 has rich downstream fanout. To capture E101 BR→Endosperm_Proliferation and E102 BR⊣PRC2, route via BZR1 instead of breaking the gate.

Biosynthesis-degradation balance present, but DELLA is COMPLETELY MISSING. GA currently acts directly on Integument_Growth, which is biologically backwards — GA destabilises DELLA, DELLA represses growth. Adding DELLA enables E033 GA⊣DELLA and E028 DELLA→ANT for proper signal flow.
Bio-degradation balanced, downstream effects on Endosperm_Proliferation, Ovule_size, DA1 captured. No AHK receptor module — acceptable since not curated for seed.

ABA biosynthesis-degradation balanced; ABI3/4/5 cascade complete with VAL1/2 + PKL repression layer; LEC1/LEC2/FUS3 maturation TFs present. WRI1 (master oil/storage TF, 6 curated edges) is COMPLETELY MISSING. ABI5→Seed_Size direct edge missing.
missing_pieces: E120 LEC2→FUS3 (+ caveat for positive feedback)

per_pathway_audit.comment: Entirely missing. No sugar/energy metabolism arc. Could not find these nodes in curated_edges either — flag as literature_gap.
missing_pieces: TPS1, T6P, SnRK1, TOR all absent from curated_edges.json

per_pathway_audit.comment: miR396→GRF and GRF→Cell_Proliferation present, but GIF1 is detached — it has 0 inputs (treated as source) and only 1 outgoing edge. The GRF–GIF heterodimer is canonical.

All three subunits present and AGB1→AGG3 / GPA1→AGG3 (network direction) wires the heterotrimer. However curated E133 has direction AGG3→AGB1 and E136 AGG3→Seed_Size (direct effect on phenotype) is missing.
Curated E212 ABI4→ABI4 self-positive loop excluded. Can cause runaway amplification under perturbation; review per BUILDER §14 trap before adding.

suggestions.description: Add DELLA as PROTEIN_COMPLEX node and reroute GA signaling through it
suggestions.biological_justification: GA acts by destabilising DELLA proteins (RGA, GAI, RGL1/2/3), which are the actual transcriptional repressors of growth genes including ANT. Without DELLA, the network has GA→Integument_Growth(+) which is biologically inverted relative to mechanism. Adding DELLA enables proper GA Perception Gate: GA⊣DELLA⊣{ANT, growth}.
suggestions.implementation: Add DELLA node (PROTEIN_COMPLEX, is_source=False). Add edges: GA⊣DELLA (E033, sign=-1), DELLA→ANT (E028, sign=+1). Optionally also DELLA⊣Integument_Growth(-) but only if curated; otherwise route via ANT. Consider whether to drop direct GA→Integument_Growth edge to preserve Perception Gate purity.

suggestions.description: Add WRI1 as GENE node to capture seed-oil/storage maturation arm
suggestions.biological_justification: WRI1 is the master TF for seed oil and reserve accumulation (binds AW box of glycolytic and lipid biosynthesis genes). LEC1, LEC2, FUS3 all directly activate WRI1 (well-curated). Currently the maturation cascade dead-ends at ABI3/4/5 without engaging the storage program.
suggestions.implementation: Add WRI1 node (GENE, is_source=False). Add edges LEC1→WRI1 (E123, +), LEC2→WRI1 (E124, +), FUS3→WRI1 (E125, +). To connect to phenotype, add WRI1→Storage_reserves (+) — this is mechanistically supported but should be confirmed against curated repository (file as literature_gap if not present).

suggestions.description: Add E146 GRF→GIF1 (+) and E149 GIF1→Seed_Size (+) to fix GRF–GIF1 cell-proliferation hub
suggestions.biological_justification: GRF–GIF1 heterodimer is THE canonical co-activator complex for organ-size regulation. GIF1 currently has 0 inputs (silently treated as source) and 1 output — inconsistent with its hub role. Adding these two edges restores miR396⊣GRF→GIF1→{Integument_Growth, Seed_Size} signal flow.
suggestions.implementation: Add edge GRF→GIF1 (E146, sign=+1). Add edge GIF1→Seed_Size (E149, sign=+1). Set GIF1.is_source=False after change.

suggestions.description: Add E030 ANT→Integument_Growth (+) to fix ANT under-representation
suggestions.biological_justification: ANT is the master AP2-domain TF for integument primordium proliferation. It currently outputs only to Ovule_size, leaving the integument arm without its principal driver. ANT mutants have severely reduced ovules and seeds; this edge is HIGH confidence and must be present.

suggestions.description: Add E040 SHB1→IKU2 and E042 MINI3→IKU2 to complete HAIKU pathway
suggestions.biological_justification: Canonical textbook HAIKU pathway is SHB1→MINI3→IKU1/IKU2; both SHB1 and MINI3 directly bind the IKU2 promoter (ChIP). Currently only IKU1→IKU2 is wired — SHB1 and MINI3 reach IKU2 indirectly via IKU1, missing the fan-out architecture that is well-documented.
MADS-box TF SEEDSTICK promotes integument cell divisions in early seed development. Currently SEEDSTICK only outputs to E2FA — misses its direct integument role.

suggestions.description: Add direct phenotype effectors E116, E136, E149 to Seed_Size
suggestions.biological_justification: ABI5⊣Seed_Size (E116), AGG3→Seed_Size (E136), GIF1→Seed_Size (E149) are HIGH-confidence direct edges supported by mutant phenotype data. Currently each routes only via process intermediates (SHB1, Cell_Proliferation_Duration, Integument_Growth) — capturing direct effects improves single-mutant testability.
suggestions.implementation: Add ABI5→Seed_Size (-1), AGG3→Seed_Size (+1), GIF1→Seed_Size (+1). Phenotype input count rises from 5 to 8; still acceptable.

suggestions.description: Add E170 Cell_Proliferation→Integument_Growth (+) and E074 Endosperm_Proliferation→Integument_Growth (+) to wire process-level cross-talk
suggestions.biological_justification: Cell_Proliferation feeds Integument_Growth (the maternal cell-division layer is part of integument growth). Endosperm growth communicates back to maternal integument expansion via mechanical/signalling cues (E074 HIGH conf).

suggestions.description: Route BR→Endosperm_Proliferation and BR⊣PRC2 via BZR1, not via direct hormone edges
suggestions.biological_justification: Curated edges E101 (BR→Endosperm_Proliferation) and E102 (BR⊣PRC2) describe BR signaling effects whose mechanism is BES1/BZR1-mediated. Adding direct hormone edges would break the clean BR Perception Gate currently in place. Instead add BZR1→Endosperm_Proliferation (+1) and BZR1⊣PRC2 (-1) as the signaling-output effects.
suggestions.implementation: Do NOT add direct Brassinosteroid→Endosperm_Proliferation or Brassinosteroid⊣PRC2. Instead add BZR1→Endosperm_Proliferation (+1, justified by E101) and BZR1⊣PRC2 (-1, justified by E102). BZR1 fanout rises from 6 to 8 outputs — high but acceptable for a master TF.

suggestions.biological_justification: Auxin represses sporophytic PRC2 expression in integuments — this is direct transcriptional regulation, not signaling-mediated. Adding the direct edge is mechanistically appropriate.
suggestions.implementation: Add Auxin⊣PRC2 (sign=-1). Auxin fanout rises from 3 to 4.

suggestions.description: Add E133 AGG3→AGB1 (+) to align G-protein heterotrimer wiring with literature
suggestions.biological_justification: Network currently has AGB1→AGG3 but curated direction is AGG3→AGB1 (E133). Heterotrimeric G-proteins stabilise mutually but the literature-supported direction is the curated one. Either replace AGB1→AGG3 with AGG3→AGB1, or keep both (heterotrimer assembly is cooperative).
suggestions.implementation: Add AGG3→AGB1 (+1). Optionally retain AGB1→AGG3 if BUILDER prefers symmetrical assembly model. Otherwise replace.

suggestions.description: Consider E120 LEC2→FUS3 (+) but evaluate positive-feedback risk
suggestions.biological_justification: LEC2↔FUS3 mutual activation is canonical maturation TF biology. Currently FUS3→LEC2 is in network. Adding LEC2→FUS3 creates a tight positive feedback loop — risky per Trap 1, but in this case the mutual activation is biologically real and damping=0.7 should stabilise.
suggestions.implementation: Add LEC2→FUS3 (+1). Monitor for runaway amplification on KO/OE perturbations.

suggestions.biological_justification: ABI4 self-activation is curated (Reeves et al.) but a positive self-loop can amplify perturbations dramatically. If included, document Trap 1 risk in mechanism field.
suggestions.implementation: Optional: add ABI4→ABI4 (+1). If accepted, BUILDER must verify it does not destabilise the ABI cascade in baseline simulation.

suggestions.description: Sugar / T6P / TOR / SnRK1 metabolic axis entirely missing from curated_edges.json
suggestions.biological_justification: Seed filling is heavily controlled by sugar status (TPS1→T6P→SnRK1 vs TOR balance). For a seed-size network this is a notable gap. Step 1 LITERATURE REVIEW should search for 'TPS1 seed size Arabidopsis', 'T6P seed filling', 'TOR endosperm', 'SnRK1 seed maturation' papers and add curated edges.
suggestions.implementation: Step 1 backlog item; not actionable by BUILDER in this iteration.

suggestions.description: Hormone transporter regulators (ABCG17/18, RGL2) not curated
suggestions.biological_justification: ABA transporters ABCG17/18 (E113/E114) and DELLA family member RGL2 (E131, E033 if DELLA added) appear as orphan sources in curated_edges. If they were curated as in-network nodes, ABA transport modulation could be modelled.

suggestions.description: Auxin Perception Gate is partially violated by direct Auxin→Integument_Growth and Auxin→Endosperm_Proliferation edges
suggestions.biological_justification: Auxin currently has 3 outgoing edges including direct phenotype-process edges that bypass the TIR1→ARF2 module. To preserve Perception Gate purity, route these effects via ARF2 (which already inhibits Integument_Growth). However, removing direct edges may lose mechanistic richness.
suggestions.implementation: Optional: drop Auxin→Integument_Growth (+) and Auxin→Endosperm_Proliferation (+); route through TIR1→ARF2 with ARF2 acting on both. Keep current edges if curated evidence supports direct hormone effects independent of TIR1.

literature_gaps: TPS1 / T6P / TOR / SnRK1 sugar-energy axis entirely absent from curated_edges.json — a major omission for seed-filling biology
RGL2 (E131) and DELLA family GID1A/B receptors (E034, E035) referenced by curated edges but not present as in-network candidate nodes
Hormone transporters ABCG17/18 (E113, E114) referenced in curated edges but not in network
MPK3/MPK6 phosphorylate DA1 (E172, E173) — MAPK module not curated as nodes
TPL co-repressor of ARF2 (E025) not curated as node
PHB/REV (E202, E204) HD-ZIP III TFs downstream of ANT not curated as nodes
Endosperm_cellularization process node (E109 ABA target) not curated — could enrich endosperm arm

Seed_coat_structure / Seed_oil_content / Tannin_synthesis terminal phenotypes referenced (E166, E167, E128, E168) but not curated as separate phenotype nodes — could be added if seed-size paper wants sub-phenotype resolution
MEE45, AGAMOUS, SEP3 as upstream regulators of ANT/SEEDSTICK (E027, E206, E207) not curated as nodes
